title: Who a Godly Man Is When Nobody's Watching
caption:
The private version of you isn't a different person. It's the real one.

A man of God isn't the version you present on Sunday morning. He's what the room looks like when the door's closed. What he reaches for at midnight. How he treats the person who can't do anything for him. What his prayer life looks like when no one's listening.

Most men build a public self and manage the private one. That gap is where a man drifts. The work of formation is closing the gap — not performing better in public, but becoming more consistent in private.

"When you pray, go into your room, close the door and pray to your Father, who is unseen." — Matthew 6:6

Save this and send it to the man you trust with the private version.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #realmen #christianity #scripture
